subcodes.first_line: O ye two radiant servants of the Abha Beauty! In truth, concerning the honored Afnán, the utmost endeavor hath been exerted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده تابنده جمال ابهی در حق جناب افنان فی الحقیقه نهایت همت مجری
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @praise and encouragement, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
